summary: PR 2700 linked `melee/ft/ftaction.c` by changing it from NonMatching to Matching, with small code-shape adjustments in ftaction command handlers, bitfield naming/layout updates for `footstep_fx_0`, and symbol metadata changes for local jump tables and ftaction sdata2 constants. The bot report records 3 new matches, including `ftAction_80072CD8`, `ftAction_80072E4C`, and `.sdata2` for `main/melee/ft/ftaction`.

key_files.role: Primary matching source changes for ftaction command handlers and literal/code-shape adjustments.
Build/link status change marking `melee/ft/ftaction.c` as Matching instead of NonMatching.
Symbol metadata update for ftaction data/jump table and sdata2 constants, changing generated global names to local numeric labels.
Header bitfield update for `struct footstep_fx_0`, including `boneId` and narrower `x1_b7` field.

what_changed.text: `ftAction_8007121C` replaced `(1 / 256.0f)` expressions with the literal `0.003906f` for hitbox scale and offsets.

`ftAction_80072CD8` changed local declaration order/shape, replaced a temporary anonymous struct with `u32 cmd_words[3]`, assigned `fp` via `gobj->user_data` instead of `GET_FIGHTER(gobj)`, removed TODO comments, and manually expanded `SKIP_CMD(cmd, 3)` into three increments.
`ftAction_80072E4C` added an unused `u32`, assigned `fp` via `gobj->user_data`, removed a TODO comment, and manually expanded `SKIP_CMD(cmd, 3)` into three increments.
`struct footstep_fx_0` in `src/melee/lb/types.h` renamed/repacked bitfields from `x0_b6_7 : 2` to `boneId : 8` and from `x1_b1_7 : 7` to `x1_b7 : 1` while preserving surrounding fields.
`config/GALE01/symbols.txt` changed ftaction `.data` jump-table labels from `jtbl_803C08A4`, `jtbl_803C08C0`, and `jtbl_803C08DC` to local numeric labels `@576`, `@837`, and `@907`.
`config/GALE01/symbols.txt` changed ftaction `.sdata2` constants from global `ftAction_804D82A0`-style names to local numeric labels `@243`, `@245`, `@247`, `@904`, `@905`, `@906`, and `@1231`.

smart_moves.text: The PR paired the source changes with symbol metadata and configuration changes needed to link the entire `ftaction` translation unit as Matching.
Replacing an ad hoc stack struct with `u32 cmd_words[3]` made the temporary command buffer explicit as three command words.
The header update gave the `footstep_fx_0` bitfield a semantic `boneId` name where the diff indicates the field spans 8 bits.

decomp_lessons.text: A translation unit link-up may require coordinated source, symbol metadata, and build-config edits; here `ftaction.c` was only marked Matching after source tweaks and local symbol-label updates landed together.

For MWCC matching in this slice, source-level helper/macros were not always preserved: `GET_FIGHTER(gobj)` was replaced by direct `gobj->user_data`, and `SKIP_CMD(cmd, 3)` was expanded into three increments in two ftaction handlers. Treat this as local matching evidence, not a global style preference.

naming_conventions.text: `footstep_fx_0` uses `boneId` as a semantic bitfield name for the 8-bit field immediately after the 6-bit opcode; adjacent uncertain fields remain address/bit-style such as `x1_b7`, `x2_b0_7`, and `x3_b0_7`.
Local ftaction data labels in symbols metadata may use numeric local-label style such as `@576` or `@243` rather than invented `ftAction_...` globals when the diff marks them as local scope.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.text: Used an exact decimal float literal `0.003906f` instead of `(1 / 256.0f)` in hitbox scaling and offset calculations.
Adjusted stack/local layout in `ftAction_80072CD8` by reordering locals, replacing an anonymous three-word struct with `u32 cmd_words[3]`, and adding an `unused` local.
Expanded `SKIP_CMD(cmd, 3)` to three explicit `++(cmd)->u` statements in `ftAction_80072CD8` and `ftAction_80072E4C`.
Changed direct fighter access from `GET_FIGHTER(gobj)` to `gobj->user_data` in two handlers, apparently as part of the local codegen match.
Changed ftaction `.sdata2` and jump-table symbol names/scopes to local numeric labels, matching the linked-unit metadata used by this PR.

review_feedback.author: decomp-dev[bot]
review_feedback.text: GALE01 report recorded matched code 74.45% (+0.02%, +736 bytes), linked code 48.02% (+0.25%, +9620 bytes), matched data 41.89% (+0.00%, +40 bytes), linked data 35.53% (+0.05%, +568 bytes), and 3 new matches: `main/melee/ft/ftaction` `.sdata2`, `ftAction_80072CD8`, and `ftAction_80072E4C`.

notes: The raw diff is complete and changed-file metadata is present.
The PR body is empty and there are no human review comments in the loaded slice.
The bot report provides narrow match evidence for `.sdata2`, `ftAction_80072CD8`, and `ftAction_80072E4C`, but the slice does not include full build logs or objdiff details.
Do not infer reviewer intent or general style acceptance from the merge alone.

accepted_candidate_records.title: ftaction linked by coordinating source, symbols, and configure status
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR 2700 changed `melee/ft/ftaction.c` from NonMatching to Matching, while also updating ftaction source code and symbol metadata. The bot report recorded 3 new matches for `main/melee/ft/ftaction`: `.sdata2`, `ftAction_80072CD8`, and `ftAction_80072E4C`.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Manual command pointer increments matched ftaction handlers
accepted_candidate_records.text: In `ftAction_80072CD8` and `ftAction_80072E4C`, `SKIP_CMD(cmd, 3)` was replaced with three explicit `++(cmd)->u` statements in the PR that linked ftaction.

source_update_candidates.title: ftaction.c marked Matching in PR 2700
source_update_candidates.reason: This is a path/status fact owned by source/path-fact curation, not a global decomp lesson.

source_update_candidates.title: footstep_fx_0 bitfield includes boneId after PR 2700
source_update_candidates.text: `src/melee/lb/types.h` changed `struct footstep_fx_0` so the field after `opcode : 6` is named `boneId : 8`, followed by `use_alt_bone : 1` and `x1_b7 : 1`.
source_update_candidates.reason: Header layout/naming fact should be curated as a source/path fact rather than promoted as a global naming rule.

source_update_candidates.title: ftaction local data labels changed to numeric local labels
source_update_candidates.text: PR 2700 changed ftaction `.data` jump-table labels and `.sdata2` constants in `config/GALE01/symbols.txt` from `jtbl_...` or `ftAction_...` names to local numeric labels such as `@576`, `@837`, `@907`, `@243`, `@245`, and `@247`.
source_update_candidates.reason: Symbol metadata is source-owned and should be curated as a path/symbol fact, not generalized without more evidence.

rejection_notes: Do not generalize direct `gobj->user_data` access as preferred over `GET_FIGHTER`; this PR only proves it was used locally for two ftaction handlers.
Do not generalize manual expansion of `SKIP_CMD(cmd, 3)` as a style rule; it is only evidenced as a local matching tactic in this slice.
Do not claim human reviewer approval or rationale; no human review comments are present.
Do not claim full objdiff/build validation beyond the loaded decomp-dev bot report.
